title: Elevate '24 is also online!
excerpt:
In case you are not able to make it in-person to our NYC, LND or Sydney conferences, we will be bringing the best of Elevate session to you online! 
Join us in the monday mansion on December 4th to explore our virtual co…

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
In case you are not able to make it in-person to our NYC, LND or Sydney conferences, we will be bringing the best of Elevate session to you online!

Join us in the monday mansion on December 4th to explore our virtual conference center and experience the magic of Elevate.

image1853×889 120 KB

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml: This is fantastic! It’s great to see inclusivity for those who can’t travel due to work/personal commitments.

posts.author: TraceyVF (Tracey VanFleet)
posts.cookedHtml: I was not ever able to find the link or way to get to the certification session. Does anybody have a direct link or repeatable instructions? Don’t see it in the list of videos, even with All Videos selected.
